title: Horizon Design System refresh
description: Built and evolved a scalable iconography and illustration system for our design system refresh, including 800+ utility icons and 100+ illustrations. Introduced a 20px size to bridge the gap between our existing 16px and 24px, enabling our designers with greater flexibility and increasing adoption across product teams by 21%.

Led end to end unification strategy of 200+ multi-colored icons across ServiceNow’s Service Portal. Collaborated cross-functionally with PMs, designers, and engineers to audit >90 use cases to standardize icon usage and theming patterns and built a design library to standardize patterns for further adoption.

Maintained shared icon libraries using Figma plugins for organization and validation, supporting cross-functional teams with efficient handoff of icon and animation requests, and ensuring consistent implementation of design system standards across product experiences.

items.text: Iconography evolution, introduction of 20px icon size

title: ServiceNow EmployeeWorks
description: Established an icon animation strategy through cross-functional collaboration with researchers, designers, and stakeholders, defining interaction patterns that improved product usability and clarity.
Defined icon and illustration animations for ServiceNow's design system, establishing scalable animation behaviors across core product experiences and emerging AI offerings.
Explored and developed visual concepts to expand our visual language in the second phase of our design system refresh.

items.text: Navigation icon animation levels determined through research
Scalable menu icon illustrations across core product experiences

title: Lightstep Incident Response
description: Owned the visual design of key Lightstep workflows within a 0→1 DevOps/SRE platform in ServiceNow's billion dollar ITSM portfolio, as 1 of 2 design system focused product designers, applying systems thinking to create scalable components and reusable patterns across enterprise-scale experiences.

Established custom component foundations for Lightstep's unique use cases, developing detailed design specifications that enabled scalable adoption while maintaining alignment with ServiceNow's broader design ecosystem.
Lightstep reached 40+ clients following MVP launch in March 2022.

items.text: Defining and managing the system library, ensuring consistent design strategy
On-call flow custom components and specifications

title: horizon.servicenow.com
description: Designed reusable illustration patterns, created animations for motion patterns and page headers, and set visual guidelines for our new design system site to enable consistent asset reproduction and implementation.
